zh.South Kelsey, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾素斯 凱爾西
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard II Hansard於大約1395年出生時，他的父親Richard Hansard I20歲，母親Joan Aske19歲。他和Joan Hedworth至少有4個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1466年4月14日之前在英國林可爾史爾。

zh-hans.South Kelsey, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾素斯 凱爾西
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard II Hansard于大约1395年出生时，他的父亲Richard Hansard I20岁，母亲Joan Aske19岁。他和Joan Hedworth至少有4个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1466年4月14日之前在英国林可爾史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Hansard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): of Norman origin, from the Middle English and Old French personal name Ansard with prosthetic H-; from ancient Germanic ans- ‘(pagan) god’ + ward ‘guard, protector’ or hard- ‘brave, hardy’.

variants.name: Hazard
meanings: English: Anglo-Norman French variant of   Hansard  .

English and French: nickname from Old French, Middle English hasard, hazard ‘game of dice’, perhaps given to a player at hazard, i.e. a gambler, trickster, or rascal. The word probably derives from Arabic az-zahr, from az, assimilated form of the definite article al, + zahr ‘die’. It appears to have been picked up in the Holy Land and brought back to Europe by Provençal crusaders.
English: possibly in some instances of Flemish origin, a nickname from Middle Dutch hasart ‘hare’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard II Hansard was born about 1395, his father, Richard Hansard I, was 20 and his mother, Joan Aske, was 19. He had at least 4 sons and 4 daughters with Joan Hedworth. He died before 14 April 1466, in Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard II Hansard est né environ 1395, son père, Richard Hansard I, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Joan Aske, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles avec Joan Hedworth. Il est décédé avant 14 avril 1466, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard II Hansard um 1395 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Hansard I 20 und seine Mutter Joan Aske 19. Er hatte mit Joan Hedworth mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb vor 14. April 1466 in Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard II Hansard è nato il circa 1395, il suo padre, Richard Hansard I, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Joan Aske, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie con Joan Hedworth. Morì prima del 14 aprile 1466, nel Lincolnshire, England.

ja.South Kelsey, Lincolnshire, England: イギリスリンコルンシュアイアソウス ケルセイ
ja.Lincolnshire, England: イギリスリンコルンシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard II Hansardが約1395年に生まれた時，父Richard Hansard Iは20歳，母Joan Askeは19歳であった。彼はJoan Hedworthとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1466年4月14日以前にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard II Hansard(이)가 대략 1395년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Hansard I(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Aske(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Joan Hedworth(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1466년 4월 14일 이전 영국 링코실르에서 사망했다.

mn.about 1395–before 14 April 1466: ойролцоогоор 1395 он–1466 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 14–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard II Hansard nasceu aproximadamente 1395, seu pai, Richard Hansard I, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Joan Aske, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas com Joan Hedworth. Ele faleceu antes 14 de abril de 1466, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard II Hansard родился около 1395 г., его отцу по имени Richard Hansard I было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Aske, 19. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери от Joan Hedworth. Он умер перед 14 апрель 1466 г. в местности линколншир, Англия.

sm.about 1395–before 14 April 1466: e tusa o le 1395–a'e le'I oo le 14 Aperila 1466

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard II Hansard nació aproximadamente 1395, su papá, Richard Hansard I, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Joan Aske, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas con Joan Hedworth. Murió antes de 14 de abril de 1466, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
